pricing_conclusion: Hurdle prices are derived from the decision-grade universal contract; they do not constitute a capital decision.
falsifiers: ETH fair value per share falls below the low case after sustained spot decline and further dilution.
ATM issuance dilutes ETH per share faster than token price rises for two consecutive quarters.
Staking yield falls below corporate G&A drag for two reporting periods.
Preferred or warrant conversion materially reduces common look-through below the low case.
